SQLLite.SQL: SELECT W.WARRANT_ID AS "WarrantId" , W.DEF1_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AS "Def1PartyRoleCode" , W.DEF1_CASE_PARTY_NO AS "Def1CasePartyNo" , W.DEF2_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AS "Def2PartyRoleCode" , W.DEF2_CASE_PARTY_NO AS "Def2CasePartyNo" FROM WARRANTS W WHERE W.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.caseNumber} AND ( ( W.DEF1_PARTY_ROLE_CODE = ${param.againstPartyRoleCode} AND W.DEF1_CASE_PARTY_NO = ${param.againstCasePartyNo} ) OR ( W.DEF2_PARTY_ROLE_CODE = ${param.againstPartyRoleCode} AND W.DEF2_CASE_PARTY_NO = ${param.againstCasePartyNo} ) ) AND (W.REP_PARTY_ROLE_CODE, W.REP_CASE_PARTY_NO) IN ((SELECT IP1.PARTY_ROLE_CODE , IP1.CASE_PARTY_NO FROM INFAVOUR_PARTIES IP1 WHERE IP1.JUDG_SEQ = ${param.judgSeq} AND (IP1.DELETED_FLAG = 'N' OR IP1.DELETED_FLAG IS NULL) ) UNION ALL (SELECT CPR2CPR.CPR_B_PARTY_ROLE_CODE , CPR2CPR.CPR_B_CASE_PARTY_NO FROM INFAVOUR_PARTIES IP2 , CPR_TO_CPR_RELATIONSHIP CPR2CPR WHERE IP2.JUDG_SEQ = ${param.judgSeq} AND (IP2.DELETED_FLAG = 'N' OR IP2.DELETED_FLAG IS NULL) AND CPR2CPR.CPR_A_CASE_NUMBER = IP2.CASE_NUMBER AND CPR2CPR.CPR_A_PARTY_ROLE_CODE = IP2.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND CPR2CPR.CPR_A_CASE_PARTY_NO = IP2.CASE_PARTY_NO AND CPR2CPR.DELETED_FLAG = 'N' ) ) AND (W.WARRANT_ID NOT IN (SELECT WR1.WARRANT_ID FROM WARRANT_RETURNS WR1 , RETURN_CODES RC1 WHERE WR1.WARRANT_ID = W.WARRANT_ID AND WR1.DEFENDANT_ID = 1 AND WR1.ERROR_INDICATOR IS NOT NULL AND WR1.ERROR_INDICATOR != 'Y' AND RC1.RETURN_CODE = WR1.RETURN_CODE AND RC1.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = WR1.RETURN_CODE_COURT_CODE AND RC1.RETURN_TYPE = 'F') OR ( W.DEFENDANT2 IS NOT NULL AND W.WARRANT_ID NOT IN (SELECT WR2.WARRANT_ID FROM WARRANT_RETURNS WR2 , RETURN_CODES RC2 WHERE WR2.WARRANT_ID = W.WARRANT_ID AND WR2.DEFENDANT_ID = 2 AND WR2.ERROR_INDICATOR IS NOT NULL AND WR2.ERROR_INDICATOR != 'Y' AND RC2.RETURN_CODE = WR2.RETURN_CODE AND RC2.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = WR2.RETURN_CODE_COURT_CODE AND RC2.RETURN_TYPE = 'F') ) )

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper cpSuper ccbcMan ccbcUser ccbcSGB2
